title: Pass 3: Missing docs updates for current SCHC/RPL/SenML rule IDs and profiles
description: spec/appendix-schc.md, appendix-rpl.md, appendix-senml.md and drafts/*.md not updated to reflect exact constants in rust/lichen-core/src/constants.rs and lichen/subsys/schc/. Interop and compliance documentation incomplete. Different focus from prior passes on code style.
